question: A scatterbrained fairy intern grants you a B-tier superpower. Which do you take?
options: I can always guess to the cent how much my grocery shop will cost
I always insert USB sticks the right way up on the first try
I can telepathically transfer my hangover to people I don't like (Sundays only)
My hair air-dries into perfect styling on command
I know instantly which Tupperware lid belongs to which container
I can understand all animals, but they speak in thick regional dialect about their tax returns

question: Your group pulls a heist tomorrow. Who gets which role?

values: The mastermind – has a 40-slide plan and a moodboard
The getaway driver – scary calm at 180 km/h
The hacker – 14 monitors, zero social life
The charming distraction – talks the guard into handing over the keys
The muscle – no plan, pure presence
The inside contact – knows someone who knows someone
The loose cannon who ruins it at the worst moment
The one who disappears with all the money in the end
The lookout who checks their phone at exactly the wrong second

question: Choose your household curse:
The witch curses you. Which everyday curse do you pick?
options: There's a tiny pebble in every shoe
My battery only charges to 84% and jumps from 15% straight to 0%
There's always a smudge in the middle of my glasses or screen
Right after brushing my teeth I crave orange juice
I constantly feel like I need to sneeze
My WiFi only streams Netflix in pixelated 480p

question: You are reincarnated as an object in a shared flat. As what?
options: The wobbly shopping cart that always pulls left
The smoke detector that beeps at 3:14 AM
An ancient HDMI cable behind the TV
The lint roller that no longer picks up anything
The tiny spoon that jams the dishwasher
The single sock without a partner

question: The devil offers you a deal. Which eating habit do you accept?
options: Eating pizza only with knife, fork and ketchup
Every drink has a warm pickle floating in it
Every chocolate croissant is filled with mustard
I have to loudly praise every meal like a teleshopping host

question: You need to sublet a room. Who do you take?
options: The naked-yoga guy with throat singing
The meal-prep influencer filming in the kitchen nonstop
The hobby DJ with 90s eurodance on loop
The conspiracy theorist who turns off the WiFi at night
The crypto bro who wants to pay with Bros-Coin

question: There's only one snack on the desert island. Which do you pick?
Dude, what's the worst?
options: You always have a slight itch somewhere
Your phone is always at 15% battery

question: What would you give up first when life gets stressful?
You wake up tomorrow with a new ability – which would you want most?
You can only drink one beverage for the rest of your life – what do you pick?
You get a million-euro check – what happens first?
options: Travel until the money runs out
Throw a party with the whole group
Buy real estate and embrace boomer energy

question: If you could travel to another era for one day – when do you go?
Which apps would you keep if you had to delete all the others? (max 3)
What makes a perfect group night?
How chaotic is this group? (1 = super organized, 10 = total chaos)
How was your week?
Who would survive the longest in a zombie attack?
Who would be the character that dies first in a horror movie?
Who would completely improvise in a job interview – and still get the job?
Who is most likely to become surprisingly famous in 10 years?
Who would be the best roommates in a shared flat?
Who could really go a week without their phone?
